build.buildCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y libasound2t64 libgbm1 libnss3 libnspr4 libdbus-1-3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 libgtk-3-0 && pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium
